title: Collect routine site samples
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect routine site samples demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for sampling

pcs.text: Read sampling request and confirm the purpose, priority and scope of sampling required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read sampling request and confirm the purpose, priority and scope of sampling required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read sampling request and confirm the purpose, priority and scope of sampling required.

pcs.text: Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange site access and necessary clearances or permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange site access and necessary clearances or permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange site access and necessary clearances or permits.

pcs.text: Identify site hazards and review workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site hazards and review workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site hazards and review workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm samples to be collected and sampling location, method and timeframe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm samples to be collected and sampling location, method and timeframe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm samples to be collected and sampling location, method and timeframe.

pcs.text: Assemble specified sampling equipment, safety equipment, materials and containers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble specified sampling equipment, safety equipment, materials and containers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble specified sampling equipment, safety equipment, materials and containers.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-use and cleanliness checks of all items to ensure they are fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-use and cleanliness checks of all items to ensure they are fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-use and cleanliness checks of all items to ensure they are fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Check all items against inventory and stow to ensure safe transport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check all items against inventory and stow to ensure safe transport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check all items against inventory and stow to ensure safe transport.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for sampling

elements.title: Conduct sampling

pcs.text: Locate and access sampling points at the site in accordance with security and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and access sampling points at the site in accordance with security and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and access sampling points at the site in accordance with security and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Seek advice if the required samples cannot be collected or if procedures require modification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice if the required samples cannot be collected or if procedures require modification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice if the required samples cannot be collected or if procedures require modification.

pcs.text: Select and use sampling equipment in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use sampling equipment in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use sampling equipment in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record all labelling information in accordance with workplace and/or legal traceability requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all labelling information in accordance with workplace and/or legal traceability requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all labelling information in accordance with workplace and/or legal traceability requirements.

pcs.text: Record sample appearance, environmental conditions and any other factors that may impact on sample integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record sample appearance, environmental conditions and any other factors that may impact on sample integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record sample appearance, environmental conditions and any other factors that may impact on sample integrity.

pcs.text: Follow procedures for site security when sampling is completed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow procedures for site security when sampling is completed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures for site security when sampling is completed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct sampling

elements.title: Finalise sampling

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures for required cleaning and decontamination of equipment and vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace procedures for required cleaning and decontamination of equipment and vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures for required cleaning and decontamination of equipment and vehicle.

pcs.text: Check equipment, materials and samples against inventory and stow for safe transport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment, materials and samples against inventory and stow for safe transport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment, materials and samples against inventory and stow for safe transport.

pcs.text: Liaise with relevant personnel to restore normal production and/or services as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with relevant personnel to restore normal production and/or services as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with relevant personnel to restore normal production and/or services as necessary.

pcs.text: Maintain integrity of samples during transportation in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain integrity of samples during transportation in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain integrity of samples during transportation in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Deliver samples to the required collection point and complete all documentation to ensure traceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deliver samples to the required collection point and complete all documentation to ensure traceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deliver samples to the required collection point and complete all documentation to ensure traceability.

pcs.text: Check and document serviceability of equipment before storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and document serviceability of equipment before storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and document serviceability of equipment before storage.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Finalise sampling

elements.title: Maintain a safe work environment

pcs.text: Use established work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use established work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use established work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of others.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of sampling and generation of waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of sampling and generation of waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of sampling and generation of waste.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste in accordance with workplace procedures.
